transcript: Starry Night reflects the artist's desire to capture the tranquility of the cosmos amidst his personal turmoil. The central star of the painting is a representation of Van Gogh's own life as he battled mental illness while seeking to create his own legacy. The stars surrounding it symbolize the support and love of his friends and family, while the stormy clouds evoke the chaos of his personal struggles. Starry Night is a powerful reminder of Van Gogh's resilience.
